Browser-based mouse and keyboard polling rate checker. All processing
runs entirely in the browser — no data is co…

entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/awesome-privacy#457 · March 26, 2026 02:55
Add CMP comparison resource to Online Tools section #457

Adds an independent, hands-on comparison of 9 consent management platforms tested across 25+ real websites over 3 months.

Covers GDPR/ePrivacy comp…

entry.title: Lissy93 starred livrasand/gitGost
entry.content:
Lissy93 starred livrasand/gitGost · March 27, 2026 15:23
livrasand/gitGost

Anonymous git contributions, zero accounts, zero metadata. Just add remote, push, and disappear. Hosted-in Switzerland. Be a gost!

Go 9 4 issues need help Updated Mar 3
